name: feat-ESE-0021-09
title: Tilemap perf: large grid with carving until 40fps
description: Performance test: create a large tilemap (sized at roughly the 50fps point from the zoom-out test), then perform multiple carving operations per frame, increasing the count until FPS drops to 40. Measures the cost of density grid updates + marching squares regeneration under load.
demoDeliverable: Performance chart showing carves-per-frame vs FPS on a large grid, 40fps threshold marked.
